title: The Frogs: Who Is the Greatest Poet?
description: Dionysus descends to Hades to bring back a great tragedian. Aeschylus and Euripides compete — Aeschylus wins.
introduction: Dionysus descends to Hades to bring back a great tragedian. Aeschylus and Euripides compete — Aeschylus wins.

translation.text: A poet should be admired for his skill and for his counsel — because we make people in cities better.
